name: write-file
description: Write contents to a file. Creates the file if it does not exist, or overwrites if it does. Use edit-file for partial changes.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the file to write

contents.description: The full text content to write to the file

create_dirs.description: If true, create parent directories if they don't exist (default: false)

path.description: The resolved path that was written

created.description: True if the file was newly created, false if overwritten
